title: Forward Deployed Software Engineer
description: 2-5 years software engineering. Deep familiarity with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, LangGraph). End-to-end deployment of working AI agents in production - not a demo. Set up eval pipelines and define meaningful quality metrics. Hands-on with MCP servers. SQL + NoSQL at scale, Kafka/SQS messaging. High agency expected.

title: AI Engineer - Python, LangChain, LangGraph, Agentic AI, LLMs
description: 7-13 years experience. Design and implement Agentic AI workflows using LangChain and LangGraph. Build LLM-powered APIs with Python. Work on RAG pipelines over enterprise documents. Integrate with internal vector databases (pgvector, Pinecone). Required: Python, LangChain, LangGraph, REST/GraphQL API design, AWS Bedrock or Azure OpenAI experience.

title: AI Agent Development Intern
description: Unpaid internship for 3 months with possible PPO. Build LLM agents using LangChain. Stipend: 'Performance-based, ranges INR 5,000 to 15,000/month'. Requirements: BTech CS final year or freshly graduated. Working knowledge of Python, LangChain, OpenAI APIs. 40 hours per week commitment.

title: Senior LLM Engineer (Contract)
description: 20 hours/week contract role, 3-6 month engagement. US-based AI-native SMB needs senior LLM engineer to ship a hybrid RAG pipeline with reranking + Ragas evals. Stack: Python, LangChain, pgvector, Cohere rerank, Modal deploy, Langfuse tracing. Rate: $80-105/hour USD. Async-first team, weekly Friday sync.

title: AI Consultant (Project-Based)
description: Project: build a custom GPT/Claude integration for our CRM. Fixed-price $2,500 USD. Deliverables: working Python script, documentation, 30-day support. No long-term commitment. 5+ Upwork reviews preferred. Description very thin, no info on actual stack, scale, or evaluation expectations.

title: AI Co-Founder / Tech Partner Needed
description: Package approx INR 18L/yr. Not a job - it's a partnership opportunity. We're into manufacturing premium monopoly industrial instruments. Need 4 partners with AI expertise in Digital Marketing generalist, Web Dev - Graphic/video & LeadGen to scale globally. No salary - revenue share. Reply with thumbs-up emoji to apply.

title: Crypto x AI Founding Engineer (Equity)
description: Equity-only role 1-3%. Build the next AI agent layer for DeFi. Need someone who can ship LLM agents + smart contract integration. Vague on what we're actually building - will explain on a call. No salary for first 6 months. Telegram-first communication. Series of viral X posts as proof of traction.

title: Junior AI/ML Engineer
description: 0-2 years experience. Work on India's foundational AI model stack. CTC INR 12-18 LPA fixed + ESOPs. Required: strong Python, PyTorch fundamentals, exposure to one of (training/fine-tuning, inference optimization, evals). Some training data work, some application-layer work. Note: company has documented culture concerns per Blind reviews; apply with eyes open.

title: ML Training Engineer
description: Train and fine-tune foundation models for Indic languages. PyTorch + distributed training (FSDP, DeepSpeed). Manage GPU clusters, data pipelines for pretraining at scale. Not application engineering - this is foundational ML/training infrastructure. 3+ years required. MS in CS preferred but not required if equivalent experience.

title: AI Customer Success Manager
description: Drive customer adoption of our AI-powered analytics platform. 5+ years in customer-facing roles (CSM, account management, solutions engineering). 'AI' in the title - role involves zero AI engineering. Help customers configure prompts and dashboards. Salary: $90-140k OTE (heavy commission). No coding required.
